content.en:
"If there was a civilization in the Daoshan Realm before this, it would inevitably leave a trace, and it would be impossible to erase it all!"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord said.

"Well, there will indeed be a trace of it, for example, there may be clues in some forbidden places, but it must be the top forbidden land, and then we will explore those forbidden places, hoping to find something!" Jin Chen Daozu suggested.

Immediately, the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain decided to let the Half-Step Domain Ancestors enter those forbidden places in the Dao Mountain Realm.

Before that, they couldn't look down on the forbidden land in the Dao Mountain Realm, because except for the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, there was no place in the Dao Mountain Realm that could compare to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, even if it was the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, a forbidden treasure land was far more precious than the largest treasure land in the Dao Mountain Realm.

Therefore, they didn't go to explore the major forbidden lands and some treasure lands in the Dao Mountain Realm at all, only those weak forces would be interested in the treasure land forbidden lands in the Dao Mountain Realm, but the strength of the weak forces was too low, and they didn't dare to enter those top forbidden lands at all.

Before the birth of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, even Dao Mountain, the first transcendent force, did not dare to enter some top forbidden lands, because there could even bury the life of a Five-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor did not dare to enter it!

---------------

Ye Tian received a message from Jinchen Dao Ancestor and them, the half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Realm, and learned about their speculation.

"The Devouring Clan that belongs to the Daoshan Realm!"

Ye Tian was also stunned by this speculation.

If the guess is true, this is a greater threat than the three devouring clans in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!

The Devouring Clan of the Divine Heaven Realm was almost extinct, and the few remaining Devouring Clans were not threatening at all, and they were timid.

Before, those devouring clans had almost no foothold in the Divine Heaven Realm, and only then did they venture into the Vast Sea Realm Fragments when they flew into the Dark Forbidden Domain.

In fact, they didn't dare to come forward at all, for fear of being killed.

But the Devouring Clan in the Dao Mountain Realm is different, if it is true, then they have at least destroyed all the worlds, universes and chaotic continents in one realm, how far should they grow, will there be a Devouring Clan at the level of the Domain Ancestor?

However, it is not necessarily, because even if the Devouring Clan of the Domain Ancestor level is born, there is nothing left before the Dao Mountain Realm, and the Devouring Clan of the Domain Ancestor level is not willing to continue to wait here.

Because even if the Dao Mountain Realm reborn the Universe, the Chaos Continent, and the Dao Realm, it would not help them much, and they would not be able to continue to grow unless they devoured the Domain Realm.

However, it is not possible for the Dao Mountain Realm to give birth to a Domain Ancestor, which is almost a matter of probability.

Therefore, it is very likely that the Devouring Clan of the Domain Ancestor level has left the Dao Mountain Realm and gone to the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Therefore, there will definitely not be too many Devourers left, and they will not be too strong.

Of course, this is just speculation.

Wow!

Ye Tian left the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and entered the Chaotic Void of the Dao Mountain Realm.

This time, he also copied his body, after all, this time the operation was a bit dangerous, maybe he would encounter a powerful Devourer.

In fact, Ye Tian's body will almost always sit in the human world in the future, and going out is basically carried out by copying the body.

......

In the Dao Mountain Realm, a half-step domain ancestor went to the top forbidden places in the Dao Mountain realm, and the more dangerous the forbidden land, the more attractive the half-step domain ancestors were.

And Ye Tian also chose a forbidden place - the forbidden land of dragons and snakes!

The Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land is a very ancient forbidden land in the Daoshan Realm, and the years of existence are almost immeasurable, and there are a group of dragon and snake chaotic beings living in it, but because of their low wisdom and the fact that they have been living in the Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land, few people know about it.

But in fact, the strength of the dragon snake is not very strong, and the strongest one is only comparable to the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but the biggest threat to the Dragon Snake Forbidden Land is from the special realm unique to the Dragon Snake Forbidden Land.

Even if the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor enters the Dragon and Snake Territory, he will be suppressed in strength, at most comparable to the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, plus there are more dragons and snakes in the Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land, once he enters the Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land, even the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor will fall.

The point is that there are nothing good in the Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land, so no Dao Ancestor is willing to enter it.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the outside of the Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land, looked at the huge forbidden land area in front of him, and without the slightest hesitation, shuttled into the inside of the Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land.

As soon as he entered the Dragon Snake Forbidden Land, a special domain suppression attacked, but for Ye Tian, such suppression was not very strong, it only suppressed his strength of less than one percent.

If Ye Tian used the forbidden realm, then this so-called suppression would have no effect.

Therefore, entering the Dragon Snake Forbidden Land did not affect Ye Tian's strength.

Boom !!

One by one, dragon snakes with a body of thousands of miles came out of the void and tried to attack Ye Tian.

Most of these dragon snakes are only at the True Ancestor level, and they are only equivalent to elite True Ancestors, and there are only a few Dao Ancestor level dragons and snakes, and they are only Dao Ancestors of the First and Second Heavens.

In the past, a dragon and snake race of this size was naturally terrifying, but with the birth of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the strength of the Dao Mountain Realm was many times stronger than in the past, and this scale was simply too ordinary

"Die!"

Ye Tian's breath was shocked, and countless dragon snakes were instantly shocked to death, and even the dragon snakes of the first and second heavens did not survive, and they died one after another.

Ye Tian went deep into the forbidden land of the dragon snake step by step, and once the dragon snakes along the way attacked him, they were killed one after another, and none of the dragon snakes could survive.

In a short time, Ye Tian went deep into the depths of the Dragon and Snake Forbidden Land, and I am afraid that even the former Daoshan Dao Ancestor had not come here.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian saw a dragon snake mountain range that spread for millions of miles, exuding a terrifying aura.

"It's not a mountain range, it's a Dao Ancestor-level dragon snake!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Judging by the breath, the strength of this dragon snake is very strong, and it should have the strength of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but it died here, and then turned into a mountain range, and those dragon snakes were basically bred from this mountain range, and they are its bloodline descendants.

"The most powerful thing before the Dao Mountain Realm was the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor, and it was only the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but in this forbidden land, a Dragon and Snake Chaos Life at the level of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was born!" Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Beyond this mountain range, he continued deeper.

Not long after, he saw a corpse, strictly speaking, the corpse of a cultivator, and it was not one corpse, but five corpses, and it was five corpses at the Dao Ancestor level.

The five corpses floated in the void, surrounded by fragments of weapons.

"One corpse of a sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, four corpses of a sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian took a deep breath, he knew very well what this meant.
